items.title: Oil price rises above $120 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
items.summary: The price of crude oil has swung sharply as uncertainty over the war in the Middle East continues.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Hockey Fans in Buffalo Finish ‘O Canada’ After Singer’s Mic Malfunctions
items.summary: A crowd in Buffalo chimed in to sing the Canadian national anthem before an N.H.L. playoff game. That presented a contrast to ongoing U.S.-Canada tensions.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Carney, ‘strong and resolute’ in first year, now has to deliver on promises
items.summary: Canada's prime minister has used Trump's attacks on allies and others to refocus Ottawa's foreign policy.
